prompt: Voglio creare un prompt per generare documentazione tecnica delle API. Full mode.

assertions.text: Prompt contains a clear 'I want to... so that...' task statement
Final prompt is entirely in English
Prompt contains SUCCESS BRIEF with all 4 fields
Prompt references context files to be read before starting
A context.md file was actually created
Prompt does NOT contain 'act as' or 'you are a' role assignments
Prompt tells AI to read context file fully and stop if about to break rules
